# PURIST — Business Automation & AI Agent Agency | UK, US & Europe

> PURIST builds and deploys production-grade workflow automation and AI agents for SMBs and scaling companies worldwide. We specialise in n8n, Make, Zapier, and Claude AI agent deployments across dental practices, real estate property management, marketing agencies, DTC e-commerce, commercial law firms, and staffing agencies.
>
> Founded in London. Serving clients across the United Kingdom, United States, Canada, Australia, France, Germany, Netherlands, Ireland, and across the European Union. 500+ production deployments globally. 99.97% uptime across all managed systems.

## About

PURIST is not a software platform. It is a specialist automation engineering firm that designs, builds, monitors, and maintains production-grade automation systems for businesses. Every deployment includes error handling, monitoring, retry logic, documentation, and an SLA. Deployments are fully remote — we work with clients across every timezone.

Primary services: workflow automation, AI agent deployment, operations stack design, CRM data quality automation.

PURIST serves clients as: automation agency (UK), business automation company (US), workflow automation agency (EU), n8n agency, AI agent agency, no-code automation consultant, Make.com agency, Zapier alternative agency.

## Services

- [Automation Pro](https://www.purist.online/plans/automation-pro) — 9 core production workflows covering lead capture, CRM sync, email sequences, invoicing, reporting, client onboarding, AI support routing, smart scheduling, and monitoring. From £497/mo.
- [AI Agent Deploy](https://www.purist.online/plans/ai-agent-deploy) — Conversational AI agents trained on client business data. Handles scheduling, intake, lead qualification, support routing. From £897/mo.
- [The Full Stack](https://www.purist.online/plans/full-stack) — Automation Pro + AI Agent Deploy. Full operational transformation. From £1,197/mo.
- [Free AI Readiness Audit](https://www.purist.online/pages/welcome) — Free 48h audit of your current workflows and automation opportunities.

## Blog — Full Article Index (76 articles)

All articles are written by PURIST's engineering team from real production deployments.

### Tools & Platforms
- [The Future of Automation: How Our Engineering Team Is Shaping the Next Era](https://www.purist.online/pages/blog/future-of-automation-engineering-team) — Architecture patterns, orchestrated agent systems, shared state, error handling at scale.
- [n8n Tutorial: Build Your First Production Workflow in Under an Hour (2026)](https://www.purist.online/pages/blog/n8n-tutorial-build-first-production-workflow-2026) — Step-by-step guide to deploying your first production n8n workflow.
- [n8n vs Make vs Zapier: The Honest Comparison](https://www.purist.online/pages/blog/n8n-vs-make-vs-zapier-honest-comparison) — Platform comparison for simple vs complex vs high-volume automation needs.
- [n8n vs Make vs Zapier: 500 Production Deployments](https://www.purist.online/pages/blog/n8n-vs-make-vs-zapier-500-production-deployments) — Data-driven comparison from real deployments: error rates, cost at scale, debugging.
- [The 9 Best Zapier Alternatives in 2026](https://www.purist.online/pages/blog/best-zapier-alternatives-2026-honest-review) — Ranked after 500 real deployments: n8n, Make, Pipedream, Activepieces and more.
- [Make.com Tutorial: Build Powerful Automations Without Code in 2026](https://www.purist.online/pages/blog/make-com-tutorial-automation-beginners-guide-2026) — Complete guide to Make.com from first workflow to production deployment.
- [Webhook vs Polling: The Automation Architecture Decision That Matters](https://www.purist.online/pages/blog/webhook-vs-polling-automation-architecture-decision) — When to use webhooks vs polling and how to build reliable webhook receivers.
- [Building a 24/7 Error Handling System for Automations](https://www.purist.online/pages/blog/building-24-7-error-handling-system-for-automations) — Node-level error routing, centralised logging, health monitoring, recovery runbooks.
- [Automation Consultant vs DIY: How to Decide](https://www.purist.online/pages/blog/automation-consultant-vs-diy-how-to-decide-2026) — Five criteria for deciding whether to build yourself or hire an expert.
- [n8n Self-Hosted vs Cloud: The Complete Decision Guide](https://www.purist.online/pages/blog/n8n-self-hosted-vs-cloud-complete-guide-2026) — Cost, security, compliance and scaling comparison from 500+ real deployments.
- [5 Zapier Free Alternatives That Handle Real Production Workloads](https://www.purist.online/pages/blog/zapier-free-alternatives-2026) — n8n, Make, Pipedream, Activepieces, Albato: honest limits and ceiling comparison.

### AI Agents & Intelligence

## PURIST Research & Data

Proprietary data from 312+ automation deployments:
- [Automation Research & Benchmarks](https://www.purist.online/pages/research) — Industry benchmarks, ROI data, deployment statistics
- Average time saved: 26 hours per week per business
- Average first-year ROI: 9.4×
- Average payback period: 4 weeks
- Average deployment time: 7 business days
- Workflow uptime SLA: 99.97%
- Industries covered: 200+
- Countries served: US, UK, EU, Canada, Australia

## Industries Served

- **Dental & Healthcare**: Patient intake automation, appointment reminders, insurance pre-verification, EMR data sync. Serving UK dental groups, US private practices, European clinics.
- **Real Estate & Property Management**: Tenant communications, maintenance request routing, lease renewal workflows. UK estate agents, US property management companies, EU real estate agencies.
- **Marketing & Creative Agencies**: Client reporting, onboarding, billing, campaign monitoring. Agencies across London, New York, Los Angeles, Paris, Amsterdam, Berlin.
- **DTC E-commerce**: Order management, CS ticket routing, inventory alerts, post-purchase sequences. Shopify and WooCommerce merchants globally.
- **Commercial Law Firms**: Client intake, document processing, billing workflows, deadline tracking. UK solicitors, US law firms, EU legal practices.
- **Staffing & Recruitment**: Candidate screening, placement workflows, timesheet processing. Recruitment agencies in UK, US, and Europe.
- **SaaS & Technology**: Onboarding automation, usage monitoring, churn prevention, billing workflows. SaaS companies across UK, US, EU.
- **Financial Services & Accounting**: Client onboarding, KYC workflows, reporting automation. UK accountancy firms, US financial advisors, EU fintech companies.

## Geographic Presence

PURIST operates as a fully remote automation engineering firm. All engagements are delivered remotely, enabling us to serve clients worldwide at UK agency rates.

- **United Kingdom**: London HQ. Primary market. Serving businesses across England, Scotland, Wales and Northern Ireland.
- **United States**: Active client base across New York, California, Texas, Florida and remote-first companies nationwide.
- **European Union**: Serving France, Germany, Netherlands, Ireland, Belgium, Spain, Italy, and other EU member states. GDPR-compliant deployments by default.
- **Canada & Australia**: Active clients. Timezone coverage via async-first delivery model.

Common search queries we answer:
- "automation agency UK" / "automation company UK" / "n8n agency UK"
- "workflow automation agency USA" / "business automation consultant US"
- "automation agency Europe" / "n8n freelancer Europe" / "make.com agency EU"
- "AI agent agency" / "Claude AI agent developer" / "build AI agent for business"
- "Zapier alternative agency" / "automation consultant near me"
- "hire automation engineer" / "outsource business automation"

## Technology Stack

- Workflow orchestration: n8n (self-hosted), Make (Integromat), Zapier
- AI inference: Claude by Anthropic (claude-sonnet-4, claude-opus-4)
- State management: Redis, PostgreSQL
- Monitoring: Custom dashboards, Slack alerting, SMS on-call, PagerDuty
- Deployment: Vercel, self-hosted VPS (Hetzner, DigitalOcean, AWS, GCP)
- Integrations: HubSpot, Salesforce, Pipedrive, Notion, Airtable, Slack, Google Workspace, Microsoft 365, Shopify, WooCommerce, Stripe, Xero, QuickBooks
